title: GMS Week 28 - DOUBLE DOWN!
summary:
Main
The anticipated / ongoing seasonal slowdown in activity coupled with softening vessel prices has clearly started tocharacterize the year's summer / monsoon mess across the Indian sub-continent ship recycling markets. However, the 2024 version not only includes the incessant rains and a holiday-time for yard workers, but also ongoing global descent via boots on the ground warfare & an economic tumult that has double downed and unsustainably maintained negative pressures on prevailing macro-economic problems facing our world. At the global stage, problems in Ukraine & the Middle East increasingly take center stage as not only is Ukraine's entry into NATO irreversible at this stage, but it will also bear witness to NATO Allied Forces (including the United States) ensuring the security for the State of Ukraine as per the terms of NATO's agreement.
